sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36247" key="e)/ntiltos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔντιλτος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλακοῦς, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> prob. a cake <sense id="n36247.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seasoned with</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τιλτόν</foreign> (q. v.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">65</biblScope> </bibl> (s. v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
